# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest released version is supported.

[![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/pushpasta/simple-honeypot-cf7)](https://github.com/pushpasta/simple-honeypot-cf7/releases/latest)

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not create a public issue.

Use GitHub Security Advisories to report vulnerabilities privately.

Include:

- Description
- Reproduction steps
- Impact
- Suggested fix (optional)

You will receive a response as quickly as possible.
